query:
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.linkedinUrl IS NOT NULL AND c.linkedinUrl != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_linkedin,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.linkedinUrl IS NULL OR c.linkedinUrl = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_linkedin,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.company IS NOT NULL AND c.company != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_company,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.company IS NULL OR c.company = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_company,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.title IS NOT NULL AND c.title != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_title,
  COUNT(*) as total
FROM contacts c
INNER JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id
INNER JOIN projects p ON p.id = cp.projectId
WHERE c.enrichmentSource = 'manual'
  AND (c.email IS NULL OR c.email = '')
  AND p.priority IN ('hot', 'warm')
  AND p.status != 'archived';
